Bus Timings

350 Bus Timings Sweihan Slaughter House to Al Ain Central Bus Station

August 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network offers efficient travel solutions across the city, and Reg Bus 350 is a great example. This route connects Sweihan Slaughter House with Al Ain Central Bus Station, providing an important link between rural areas and the city.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 350 operates consistently throughout the day, offering multiple services in both directions. Here are the key timings:

From Sweihan Slaughter House From Al Ain Central
08:00 06:00
12:00 10:00
16:00 14:00
20:00 18:00
00:00 22:00

Bus 350 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow the link to access the 350 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare for the bus is AED 2.00 plus AED 0.05 per kilometer, with passengers able to pay using the Hafilat Smart Card. This card can be conveniently topped up online or at kiosks, providing a seamless and cashless payment option for frequent travelers.

Route Overview

The 350 Bus begins its journey at Sweihan Slaughter House and ends at Al Ain Central Bus Station, passing through a range of residential, commercial, and community stops. Below are some key stops along the route:

  1. Sweihan Slaughter House The starting point of the journey.

  2. Sweihan Wedding Hall A local venue for cultural and community events.

  3. Sweihan Police Station Serving the Sweihan community’s security needs.

  4. Emirates Post A key postal service stop in the area.

  5. Sweihan Boys School A prominent educational institution in the town.

  6. Sweihan Souq A bustling marketplace offering local goods.

  7. National Avian Research Center A notable stop for those interested in environmental and wildlife research.

  8. Ajban Road A major road connecting rural areas to the city.

  9. Al Yahar Mall A popular shopping destination for locals.

  10. Tawam Hospital A vital healthcare center serving the community.

  11. UAE University One of the leading educational institutions in the UAE.

  12. Al Jahili Park A serene public space for recreation and relaxation.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Al Ain Central Bus Station The final stop, offering connections to other bus routes and services across the region.

Accessibility Features

The buses are equipped with ramps, designated seating, and audio-visual aids to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments. This ensures a comfortable travel experience for everyone.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

A key advantage of Bus 350 is its connection to other routes at Al Ain Central Bus Station, making it easier for passengers to travel across Abu Dhabi. Whether you’re heading deeper into the city or continuing your journey to other parts of the emirate, Bus 350 offers seamless connections to other transport services.

Nearby Attractions

  • Sweihan Souq

  • National Avian Research Center
  • Al Yahar Mall
  • Tawam Hospital
  • Al Jahili Park

These stops provide easy access to essential services and recreational areas, enhancing the convenience of the journey.

Journey Experience

Traveling on Bus 350 from Sweihan Slaughter House to Al Ain Central Bus Station offers a scenic and comprehensive look at both rural and urban life in Abu Dhabi. Stops at important facilities like Tawam Hospital and Al Yahar Mall make this route convenient for both residents and visitors.

By the time passengers reach Al Ain Central Bus Station, they will have experienced a varied and well-rounded journey through the heart of the region. Travelers can enjoy the contrast between Abu Dhabi’s tranquil rural settings and its bustling urban core, making the journey not only practical but also visually engaging. The route offers a unique glimpse into the emirate’s diverse landscapes, showcasing both its natural beauty and modern infrastructure.

Travel Tips

  1. Plan ahead by checking the schedule to avoid long waits.

  2. Avoid peak hours if you prefer a quieter ride.

  3. Keep your Hafilat Card handy for quick, cashless payment.

  4. Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules.

Reg Bus 350 offers a reliable and affordable way to travel between Sweihan and Al Ain, covering key locations across Abu Dhabi.

Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting important landmarks, or exploring the outskirts, Bus 350 provides a seamless transportation experience. Hop on board and discover a convenient way to navigate Abu Dhabi’s diverse regions! For a complete list of bus routes in the city, check out the full routes here.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 23, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
